caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain dark grey background. She is wearing a light green, embroidered long-sleeved tunic with a dark necklace and a bracelet on her left wrist. A small clip-on microphone is attached to the neckline of her garment. Throughout the sequence, she gestures with both hands to emphasize her points. Initially, her right hand is raised and open, while her left hand remains lower. As the scene progresses, she brings her left hand up, cupping it as if holding an object or framing a concept, while her right hand remains raised. In the final frames, she continues to gesture with both hands in front of her chest. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a circular logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL".
